description: An absent version marker conservatively produces a non-disclosing stale-ruleset result for every grok-build rule.

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective feedback system posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it. Observed: features.feedback unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: tool version not detected — no version marker found on PATH

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective external OpenTelemetry raw prompt export posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it. Observed: telemetry.otel_log_user_prompts unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: tool version not detected — no version marker found on PATH

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective product telemetry master-switch posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it. Observed: features.telemetry unset in user config.

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective session/trace upload sub-switch posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because the key inherits the telemetry master switch and other layers are not inspected. Observed: telemetry.trace_upload unset in user config.
